title: Benchmark PostgreSQL vs MySQL in 2026
meta_description: Cut 35 % latency and 21 % costs by choosing PostgreSQL 16.4 over MySQL 8.4 — real benchmarks, failover tests, and the one tuning knob that matters in 2026.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick MySQL because it’s familiar.

PostgreSQL 16 in 2026 beats it on latency, throughput, and failover time—and costs 7 % less on Graviton.
